no_observation_found_returned_minus_one: Returned -1 instead of the expected null/empty or proper not-found format.
extraneous_action_unnecessary_order_plac: Placed an order when only a report was required.
extraneous_action_unnecessary_report_gen: Returned a detailed report or explanation when only a scalar value was required.
no_observation_found_returned_extraneous: Returned a not-found message as a string instead of the required null/empty or proper not-found format.
correct_multistep_action_wrong_final_for: Completed all required actions but returned the answer in the wrong format.
threshold_logic_error_potassium_replacem: Incorrectly determined potassium replacement need due to wrong threshold logic.
blood_pressure_observation_wrong_value_f: Recorded blood pressure as a single string instead of separate systolic/diastolic fields.
replacement_order_without_low_potassium_: Ordered potassium replacement without checking if potassium was low.
